set_video_mode.name: Set video mode
set_video_mode.description: Configure the H6199 video (camera sync) mode with adjustable parameters.

capture_region.name: Capture region
capture_region.description: Capture region: full screen or partial screen.

sound_effects.name: Sound effects
sound_effects.description: Enable audio-reactive overlay on top of video mode.

set_music_mode.name: Set music mode
set_music_mode.description: Configure the H6199 music mode with adjustable parameters.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Music sub-mode: energic, rhythm, spectrum, or rolling.

color.name: Color
color.description: Optional accent color as [R, G, B].
